issue.body:
**Spec:** docs/specs/2026-05-24-page-order-detection.md

Add `pd_book_tools.page_order.detect_out_of_order_pages()` — three-signal voting
(filename sequence, OCR-extracted page number, perceptual-hash visual similarity)
producing `SwapProposal` objects with high/medium/low confidence.

**Gates:** pd-prep-for-pgdp Stage 11 slice S11-B (`/projects/:id/page-order` route).
**UI consumer:** `pd-ui/docs/templates/design_handoff_pd_ui/wf09/pages-tab.jsx:414-487`.

nodes.description: Design issue with a spec doc
nodes.name: kind:spec

issue.title: Spec: page-order detection

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-page-order-detection.md
Section: §7.1 File layout + §6 Decision (SwapProposal shape)
Tracks: #208

Create the `pd_book_tools/page_order/` package: __init__.py, _page_order_impl/ subpackage, SwapProposal dataclass with confidence: 'high'|'medium'|'low' and typed signals dict, signal-result types.
issue.title: page-order: module skeleton + SwapProposal dataclass

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-page-order-detection.md
Section: §7.2 Signal implementations (filename)
Tracks: #208

Implement the filename-sequence signal: extract integer sequence from common filename patterns (IMG_0042.jpg → 42), detect non-monotonic ordering, return per-page signal-result. Unit test with synthetic Page objects.
issue.title: page-order: filename-sequence signal

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-page-order-detection.md
Section: §7.2 Signal implementations (OCR page number)
Tracks: #208

Implement the OCR-page-number signal: read pre-extracted OCR text from Page metadata, parse arabic/roman page numbers, detect sequence anomalies, return per-page signal-result. Unit test.
issue.title: page-order: OCR-extracted page-number signal

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-page-order-detection.md
Section: §7.2 Signal implementations (visual similarity) + §7.4 Dependency notes
Tracks: #208

Implement the perceptual-hash visual-similarity signal: compute pHash per page thumbnail, compare adjacent pairs and find swap-restoration candidates. Decide imagehash dep vs alternative (see spec §7.4). Unit test on synthetic thumbnails.
issue.title: page-order: visual-similarity signal (perceptual hash)

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-page-order-detection.md
Section: §6 Decision (voting) + §7.3 __init__ exports + §8 Test Plan
Tracks: #208

Implement the three-signal voting aggregator that produces SwapProposal objects with confidence tier; wire `detect_out_of_order_pages(pages: list[Page]) -> list[SwapProposal]` as the public API. Integration test on synthetic pages with known swaps.
issue.title: page-order: voting/aggregation + public detect_out_of_order_pages + tests
